Description: Description
Steps: Steps | Expected: Expected Result

Description: Verify new service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" appears in service list for eligible user
Precondition: User is eligible (Saudi, age 18‑65, inactive contributor) and logged in
Steps: 1. Navigate to service list. 2. Locate "Register as Voluntary Contributor". | Expected: Service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" is displayed

Description: Verify popup message appears for ineligible user selecting the service
Precondition: User is ineligible (e.g., has active engagement with GOSI) and logged in
Steps: 1. Navigate to service list. 2. Click on "Register as Voluntary Contributor". | Expected: Popup message: "Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC." (English/Arabic) appears

Description: Verify registration form is displayed after selecting the service for an eligible user
Steps: 1. Select the service. 2. Verify the registration form loads. | Expected: Registration form with Step 1 (Engagement Details) is shown

Description: Verify purpose of registration dropdown loads options based on backend business logic
Precondition: Eligible user with known last engagement details
Steps: 1. On Step 2, open "Purpose of registration" dropdown. 2. Verify options. | Expected: Dropdown shows purposes: Annuity eligibility, Annuity upgrade, Establishment owner, Freelancer (localized)

Description: Verify submission date field is auto-populated
Steps: 1. Locate "Submission date" field. 2. Observe value. | Expected: Field is pre‑filled with current date (or business logic date)

Description: Verify wage selection highlights only eligible wages based on last engagement
Precondition: User has a previous engagement that defines eligible wages
Steps: 1. Open wage dropdown. 2. Identify highlighted wages. | Expected: Only eligible wages are highlighted; others are disabled

Description: Verify selecting an ineligible wage displays eligibility reason from backend
Precondition: User selects a wage not highlighted
Steps: 1. Select a non‑highlighted wage. 2. Observe message. | Expected: System displays eligibility reason returned by backend

Description: Verify wage details are displayed after selecting a wage
Steps: 1. Observe the wage details panel. | Expected: Details for the selected wage (e.g., amount, contribution) are shown

Description: Verify health record details page shows checkbox list of medical questions
Precondition: User has completed Step 2 and proceeds to Step 3
Steps: 1. Navigate to Health Record Details. 2. Verify list of questions. | Expected: List of medical questions displayed as checkboxes

Description: Verify selecting any "yes" on a medical question moves transaction to workflow
Precondition: User is on health record page and selects "Yes" for a medical item
Steps: 1. Check "Yes" for any medical item. 2. Proceed to next step. | Expected: Transaction status set to "workflow" (pending doctor review)

Description: Verify selecting all "no" on medical questions results in auto‑approve
Steps: 1. Answer all items with "No". 2. Proceed. | Expected: Transaction is auto‑approved; no workflow status

Description: Verify user must agree to disclaimer to proceed
Steps: 1. Leave disclaimer unchecked. 2. Click Next. | Expected: System prevents progression and prompts to accept disclaimer

Description: Verify freelancer user must upload document
Steps: 1. Proceed to document upload step. 2. Attempt to continue without file. | Expected: System shows validation error requiring document upload

Description: Verify non‑freelancer user does not need to upload document (unless medical yes)
Precondition: User selected purpose other than Freelancer and all medical answers "No"
Steps: 1. Navigate to document upload step. 2. Observe if upload required. | Expected: Upload section is optional; user can proceed without upload

Description: Verify document upload required when any medical answer is "Yes"
Precondition: User selected "Yes" on any medical question
Steps: 1. Proceed to document upload step. 2. Observe requirement. | Expected: System requires upload of supporting document (e.g., medical report)

Description: Verify review page displays all entered information
Steps: 1. Go to Review step. 2. Verify displayed data matches input. | Expected: All entered details (engagement, health, documents) are shown for review

Description: Verify successful submission shows confirmation message with request ID
Precondition: Review data correct; user clicks Submit
Steps: 1. Click Submit. 2. Observe confirmation. | Expected: Confirmation message displayed, includes unique request ID

Description: Verify failed submission displays error message from backend
Steps: 1. Submit request. 2. Simulate backend error. | Expected: Error message from backend displayed (English/Arabic)

Description: Validate error message for active engagement
Precondition: User has active engagement with GOSI
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for age less than 18
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is less than 18 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for age more than 65
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is more than 65 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for NIC no match
Precondition: NIC returns no match for user
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "No match found with NIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for deceased person
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is deceased, cannot be added as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for government employee
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is a Government employee, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate NIC service unavailable after three attempts
Precondition: NIC service is down and does not respond thrice
Steps: 1. Perform registration; NIC service fails thrice. 2. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "NIC service is down and does not respond thrice. Please try later." (EN/AR)

Description: Verify nationality requirement (Saudi)
Steps: 1. Try to register. 2. Observe error. | Expected: System displays message "User must be Saudi nationality to register as VIC." (or similar)

Description: Verify age range for previous engagement (15‑17 with previous engagement)
Precondition: User age 15‑17 and has previous engagement
Steps: 1. Attempt registration. 2. Observe acceptance. | Expected: System allows registration (previous engagement overrides age lower bound)

Description: Verify user can update wage for each year; activation occurs in January of next year
Precondition: Current date is before January of next year
Steps: 1. Select wage for current year. 2. Try to update wage for next year before January. | Expected: System prevents update; message indicates activation in January

Description: Verify purpose of registration translations displayed correctly for Arabic and English
Steps: 1. View purpose list. 2. Verify Arabic labels. | Expected: Arabic descriptions shown correctly (e.g., "عامل حر")

Description: Verify error messages displayed in both languages
Steps: 1. Trigger each validation error. 2. Switch language. | Expected: Corresponding EN/AR messages appear for each error
